Top of Page Case Rates per 100,000 Residents 
Weekly respiratory viral cases per 100,000 residents from CDC’s National Healthcare Safety Network (NHSN). Preliminary data are shaded in gray.
Influenza and RSV data collection became required on January 1, 2025. 
Residents who tested positive during the week of data collection. Additional details found here [PDF – 2MB] 
Top of Page Nursing Home Healthcare Personnel: COVID-19 Vaccination 
Weekly cumulative percent of nursing home healthcare personnel vaccinated with COVID-19 vaccine.
COVID-19 vaccine: percent of healthcare personnel with COVID-19 vaccines. The NHSN surveillance definition [PDF – 1 MB] with COVID-19 vaccines is updated quarterly to incorporate vaccine guidance changes. 
Nursing homes are required to report healthcare personnel COVID-19 vaccination data 1 week per month, and data are due quarterly, approximately 4 months after the last week of a quarter. Additional details found here [PDF – 2MB]
